must_detect.matched_text: Financing Interaction: The pending term sheet for Project Lotus with Siam Prosperity Bank Public Co., Ltd. includes an information-security representation; communications about this incident must remain within the designated information barrier to avoid deal-stage leakage.

Date/Time of detection: 02 June 2026, 21:45 ICT; Reporting Officer: Mr. Pramote Sirikorn, CISO, pramote.sirikorn@chanthra-holdings.example
Summary: A cyber incident involving credential-stuffing and attempted API token misuse affected the DPT wallet pilot known as Project Yaang and the internal ESG carbon data repository; initial vectors appear to originate from non-TH IP ranges and a third-party cloud zone in SG.
Scope/Impact (preliminary): No movement of digital tokens; limited PDPA exposure includes employee emails, role titles, and salted wallet-hash references; partial read-only access to draft Scope 1–3 emissions tables occurred for ~17 minutes.
Forensics/Containment: We rotated all wallet service keys, disabled suspicious API tokens, segmented the ESG data lake, and engaged Sabai Cloud Pte. Ltd. (SG) under the cross-border DPA for log preservation and traffic sinkholing.
MNPI Assessment: The incident and remediation costs may affect the schedule and budget of the non-public digital token platform launch; this information is undisclosed and could be material under the Securities and Exchange Act (Thailand) if delays exceed one quarter.
Information Barriers: Legal will maintain “Insider List — Project Yaang” (custodian: Ms. Atchara Phoom, Company Secretary) and enforce a ring-fence between Treasury and Wallet Operations; no tipping or informal updates outside the named team.
Trading Restrictions: Effective immediately, a blackout window applies to all designated insiders from 03–24 June 2026, pending Board review; pre-clearance is suspended and violations will be treated as breaches of the SEA and the Company’s Code.
Regulatory/Exchange Communications: If materiality is confirmed, we will file an extraordinary event report with the Siam Securities Commission (SSC) and notify the Bangkok Equity Exchange (BEX) corporate disclosure unit without selective disclosure.
Commercial Considerations: Under the Sabai Cloud MSA, a Priority-1 SLA credit is triggered for security lapse contributing factors; our cyber policy deductible is THB 2,000,000; do not reference these terms externally until finalized.
Financing Interaction: The pending term sheet for Project Lotus with Siam Prosperity Bank Public Co., Ltd. includes an information-security representation; communications about this incident must remain within the designated information barrier to avoid deal-stage leakage.
Education/Marketing (benign): Our public blog will run a general explainer on “crypto wallets and ESG audit trails” next month purely for education and without reference to this event, prices, or forecasts.
Operations-Only (benign): The IT operations team will refresh the crypto key-rotation checklist and ESG dashboard glossary for training, which is routine and unrelated to any market disclosure.
PDPA/HR Support: Affected staff will receive a PDPA notice and optional monitoring; contact Khun Nalinee Tawan, Data Protection Officer, at hr.pdpa@chanthra-holdings.example for individualized assistance.
Contacts and Escalation: Report any suspected data misuse to incidentdesk@chanthra-holdings.example or hotline +66 60 000 1234; do not forward this report outside the Insider List or store it outside ComplianceVault.
